accountAvailableCash.description: Cash available for new trades: accountBalance minus accountFrozenCash.

accountFrozenCash.description: Cash reserved for pending open orders.

accountCurrentPnl.description: Unrealized P&L across all manual positions and copy-trading mirrors in account currency.

accountTotalValue.description: Total portfolio value: accountAvailableCash + accountTotalUsedMargin + accountCurrentPnl.

accountTotalUsedMargin.description: Total margin in use: manual position margins + frozen order amounts + mirror active margins.

accountBalance.description: Total cash balance (available + frozen), excluding invested amounts.
